channel.title: What I am Doing Now :: Linux Reader
channel.description: This is a page to help me stay focused and keep track of what I am doing. It is also to show others what I am currently working on and thinking about. Credit goes to Derek Sivers for starting a “Now” page movement. Read about “Now” pages here. Updated: 04-21-2025 Career Working on learning Ansible to automate my job. RHCE inc. Personal Weaning off of alcohol. 3.5oz Whiskey today. Weaning off of caffeine. 400mg today.
